title: 9 Signs a Godly Man's Discipline Doesn't Survive His Phone
caption:
Work ethic that quits at your lock screen isn't work ethic. Here are 9 signs your phone is the one actually running your discipline:

1. The phone that opens before the Bible does. Whoever gets fed first wins the morning.
2. The "quick check" that eats the hour you meant to work.
3. The notification that gets a faster reply than your conscience.
4. The deep work you keep restarting after "one more scroll."
5. The prayer you cut short because your phone buzzed.
6. The to-do list you keep rewriting instead of running.
7. The bedtime that keeps sliding for "one more video."
8. The task you'd rather scroll past than start.
9. The Sabbath you never actually take, because your phone doesn't rest either. Rest is obedience, not laziness. (Exodus 20:8)

Save this and check which one's actually running your day.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #phonefast #workethic
